_comment: TIER-1 TRUTH: human-verified attributes only (clefs, key, time, staff counts, bar-count lower bounds, spot-verified opening notes). Verified by eye from the source scans 2026-07-07 with model-cross-checking for the spot notes (bd-av64.6). Note-exact full-staff ground truth is TIER-2 and lives in goldens/ as clearly-labeled frozen model output (regression anchors), NOT truth.

staves/spohr_no17_top.png.bars_note: line-end truncated mid-exercise; 5 complete internal measures verified
staves/spohr_no17_top.png.bar1_note: spot-verified by eye AND independently reproduced by the model

staves/spohr_no21_sys.png.content_note: contains DOUBLE-dotted figures - outside the TrOMR duration vocab; attribute-tier only by design
staves/spohr_no21_sys.png.xfail_note: model misreads 3/4 on this double-dotted system (verified 3/4 by eye); expected to flip with bd-av64.13 voting / model-quality work — the gate FAILS LOUD if it starts passing so we promote it

staves/spohr_p116_sys29.png.time_note: mid-exercise line (bars 29-31), no time signature printed
staves/spohr_p116_sys29.png.content_note: the WIDE-SYSTEM class (bd-av64.14): virtuosic 16th content, attribute-tier only

pages/spohr_p055.png.staff_count_note: 5 two-staff systems of No.16 + first system of No.17; verified by eye
pages/spohr_p055.png.xfail_note: PROMOTED 2026-07-07 at floor 5 (was 0 recognized pre-bd-av64.14): fit-first geometry rescues 5 of the 7 detected bands; the 2 tightest duet bands still exceed the budget within their neighbor bounds — barline splitting (bd-av64.4) or finer detection owns the remainder

pages/spohr_p100.png.staff_count_note: 3 full-width example staves embedded in prose (the detector-precision class); several inline snippet staves are legitimately sub-detectable
pages/spohr_p100.png.xfail_note: PROMOTED 2026-07-07: bd-av64.14 fit-first geometry (ink-extent trim + extend-to-fit on over-budget bands) recognizes the prose-embedded staves; was 0 recognized before
